message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for:
- ._* (macOS resource fork files from AppleDouble format)
- .beads/last-touched (beads issue tracker timestamp marker)

These files are auto-generated and should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,3 +40,9 @@ a.out
 
 # SQLite in-memory database artifacts
 :memory:
+
+# macOS resource forks
+._*
+
+# Beads ephemeral files
+.beads/last-touched
